---
title: "Getting Started with Content Collections"
description: "A practical guide to Astro's content collections feature."
date: 2024-10-15
tags: ["astro", "tutorial", "content"]
authors: ["Dana Reyes", "Sam Chen"]
readingTime: 5
---

Content collections give you a typed, validated content layer for your Astro project.

## Define your collection

Create `src/content.config.ts` and define your schema using Zod.

## Query your content

Use `getCollection()` and `getEntry()` to access content in your pages.
